'''''Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...'' 6''' is the sixth volume in the [[Dark Horse Comics]] black-and-white collections of the original [[Marvel Comics]] series of comic books.

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 80|''Star Wars'' (1977) 80]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 83|''Star Wars'' (1977) 83]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 86|''Star Wars'' (1977) 86]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 103|''Star Wars'' (1977) 103]]
